name: Vestis Corp
summary: PART I Overview Vestis Corporation, a Delaware Corporation (Vestis, the Company, our, we or us) is a leading provider of uniform rentals and workplace supplies across the United States and Canada. We provide uniforms, mats, towels, linens, restroom supplies, first-aid supplies, safety products and other workplace supplies. In fiscal year 2025, we generated revenue of approximately $2.7 billion. We are one of the largest companies operating within the United States and Canada in our industry. We ...
